reason: The cold-boot Microsoft-style raw control reached Workbooks.Add and received Excel SCODE 0x800A03EC before a workbook could be created; persistence cannot be measured until the host accepts Add or Open again.

unrun_controls.native-cpp-direct: CMake configuration stalled before compilation or Excel launch
unrun_controls.rust-to-native-c-abi-shim: requires the unavailable native C++ shim build

interpretation: Interactive Excel open/close did not recover the Automation server.
